lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: Code and docs are healthy for a sixth straight canonical audit, but the delivery loop around YaB is stalled for a third consecutive bar-raise. Nothing has committed since e6cac08 (2026-05-29), seven days back; the working tree still holds the F1-F11 doc batch plus thirteen untracked audit and bar-raise reports, and this report makes fourteen. The two structural HIGHs are both carried unchanged: the uncommitted pile (maintainability) and the seven uninstalled CLAUDE.md skills that leave the audit-to-fix loop with no executor (skill-suite health). Zero of five open actions closed and the pile grew by two overnight, so the verdict holds at stalled. This is not a code problem; one doc-only commit plus an executor with a commit step drains the whole backlog. Bank statements in shipped git history (MEDIUM) and a stale dashboard audit block (MEDIUM) ride alongside, both still unactioned.
